steps.title: Identify the line features
steps.content: The equation $y=2x-5$ is in slope-intercept form $y=mx+b$. The slope is $2$, and the y-intercept is $(0,-5)$.

steps.title: Match the graph
steps.content: The correct graph must cross the y-axis at $-5$ and rise $2$ units for every $1$ unit to the right.

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: The correct answer shows that line, so D is correct.
